name: IronCondorStrategy
description: Neutral options strategy that profits from low volatility. Sells an OTM call spread and OTM put spread simultaneously to collect premium. Wing width adapts to the IV regime: low IV (below 0.85) uses 6, medium IV (0.85-1.05) uses 8, high IV (above 1.05) uses 12. Exits via a three-tier profit-take (50% of position at 25% profit, 25% at 50% profit, remainder at 75% profit) or a 21 DTE time stop, whichever comes first.

wingWidth.description: Default distance between strikes in dollars (medium IV regime)

wingWidthLow.description: Wing width for low IV regime (IV below 0.85)

wingWidthMedium.description: Wing width for medium IV regime (IV 0.85-1.05)

wingWidthHigh.description: Wing width for high IV regime (IV above 1.05)

ivLowBound.description: Upper bound of low IV regime

ivHighBound.description: Lower bound of high IV regime

tier1Profit.description: Profit fraction to close 50% of position

tier2Profit.description: Profit fraction to close another 25% of position

tier3Profit.description: Profit fraction to close the remaining position

exitDte.description: Close all remaining position at or below this DTE
